query: Please list the lowest ten eligible free rates for students aged 5-17 in continuation schools.
hint: Eligible free rates for students aged 5-17 = `Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)` / `Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`
sql: SELECT "Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" / "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" FROM frpm WHERE "Educational Option Type" = 'Continuation School' AND NOT "Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" / "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" IS NULL ORDER BY "Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" / "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" ASC NULLS FIRST LIMIT 10
blendsql:
SELECT `Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)` / `Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` 
FROM frpm JOIN llm ON frpm.`School Name` = llm.`School Name` AND frpm.`District Name` = llm.`District Name`
    WHERE llm.`Educational Option Type` = 'Continuation School' AND 
        frpm.`Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)` / frpm.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` IS NOT NULL 
    ORDER BY frpm.`Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)` / frpm.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` ASC LIMIT 10

query: Please list the phone numbers of the direct charter-funded schools that are opened after 2000/1/1.
hint: Charter schools refers to `Charter School (Y/N)` = 1 in the frpm
sql: SELECT T2.Phone FROM frpm AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T1."Charter Funding Type" = 'Directly funded' AND T1."Charter School (Y/N)" = 1 AND T2.OpenDate > '2000-01-01'
blendsql:
SELECT T2.Phone 
    FROM frpm AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode 
    JOIN llm ON T1.`School Name` = llm.`School Name` AND T1.`District Name` = llm.`District Name`    
    WHERE llm.`Charter Funding Type` = 'Directly funded' AND llm.`Charter School (Y/N)` = 1 AND T2.OpenDate > '2000-01-01'

query: Among the schools with the average score in Math over 560 in the SAT test, how many schools are directly charter-funded?
sql: SELECT COUNT(T2."School Code") FROM satscores AS T1 INNER JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode WHERE T1.AvgScrMath > 560 AND T2."Charter Funding Type" = 'Directly funded'
blendsql:
SELECT COUNT(T2.`School Code`) 
    FROM satscores AS T1 INNER JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode
    JOIN llm ON T2.`School Name` = llm.`School Name` AND T2.'District Name' = llm.'District Name'
    WHERE T1.AvgScrMath > 560 AND llm.`Charter Funding Type` = 'Directly funded'

query: Please list the phone numbers and cities of the schools with the top 10 SAT excellence rate.
hint: Excellence rate = NumGE1500 / NumTstTakr
sql: SELECT T1.Phone, T1.city FROM schools AS T1 INNER JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds ORDER BY CAST(T2.NumGE1500 AS REAL) / T2.NumTstTakr DESC LIMIT 10
blendsql:
SELECT T1.Phone, llm.city 
    FROM schools AS T1 INNER JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds 
    JOIN llm ON T1.Street = llm.Street AND T1.School = llm.School
    ORDER BY CAST(T2.NumGE1500 AS REAL) / T2.NumTstTakr DESC LIMIT 10

query: How many schools in Contra Costa (directly funded) have number of test takers not more than 250?
sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.CDSCode) FROM frpm AS T1 INNER JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds WHERE T1."Charter Funding Type" = 'Directly funded' AND T1."County Name" = 'Contra Costa' AND T2.NumTstTakr <= 250
blendsql:
SELECT COUNT(T1.CDSCode) 
    FROM schools AS T1 INNER JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds
    JOIN frpm AS T3 on T1.CDSCode=T3.CDSCode
    JOIN llm AS T4 ON T1.Street = T4.Street
    JOIN llm AS T5 ON T3.`School Name` = T5.`School Name` AND T3.`District Name` = T5.`District Name`    
    WHERE T5.`Charter Funding Type` = 'Directly funded' AND T3.`County Name` = 'Contra Costa' AND T2.NumTstTakr <= 250

query: Which cities have the top 2 lowest enrollment number for students in grades 1 through 12?
hint: K-12 refers to students in grades 1 through 12.
sql: SELECT T2.City FROM frpm AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode GROUP BY T2.City ORDER BY SUM(T1."Enrollment (K-12)") ASC NULLS FIRST LIMIT 2
blendsql:
SELECT T2.City 
    FROM frpm AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
    JOIN llm ON T2.Street = llm.Street AND T2.School = llm.School
    GROUP BY llm.City 
    ORDER BY SUM(T1.`Enrollment (K-12)`) ASC LIMIT 2

query: What is the administrator's email address of the chartered school with the fewest students enrolled in grades 1 through 12?
hint: Charted school means `Charter School (Y/N)` = 1 in the table frpm; Students enrolled in grades 1 through 12 refers to `Enrollment (K-12)`
sql: SELECT T2.AdmEmail1 FROM frpm AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T1."Charter School (Y/N)" = 1 ORDER BY T1."Enrollment (K-12)" ASC NULLS FIRST LIMIT 1
blendsql:
SELECT T2.AdmEmail1 
    FROM frpm AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode 
    JOIN llm ON T1.`School Name` = llm.`School Name` AND T1.`District Name` = llm.`District Name`
    WHERE llm.`Charter School (Y/N)` = 1 ORDER BY T1.`Enrollment (K-12)` ASC LIMIT 1

query: What is the complete address of the 10 school with the lowest excellence rate? Indicate the Street, City, Zip and State.
hint: Execellence Rate = NumGE1500 / NumTstTakr; complete address has Street, City, State, Zip code
sql: SELECT T2.Street, T2.City, T2.Zip, T2.State FROM satscores AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode ORDER BY CAST(T1.NumGE1500 AS REAL) / T1.NumTstTakr ASC NULLS FIRST LIMIT 10
blendsql:
SELECT T2.Street, llm.City, T2.Zip, T2.State 
    FROM satscores AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode 
    JOIN llm ON T2.Street = llm.Street
    ORDER BY CAST(T1.NumGE1500 AS REAL) / T1.NumTstTakr ASC LIMIT 10

query: Which exclusively virtual schools have the top 5 highest average reading scores?
hint: Exclusively virtual refers to Virtual = 'F'.
sql: SELECT T2.School FROM satscores AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.Virtual = 'F' ORDER BY T1.AvgScrRead DESC LIMIT 5
blendsql:
SELECT T2.School 
    FROM satscores AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode 
    JOIN llm ON T2.School = llm.School AND T2.Street = llm.Street
    WHERE llm.ExclusivelyVirtual = 'Y' ORDER BY T1.AvgScrRead DESC LIMIT 5

query: What is the average math score of the school with the lowest average score for all subjects, and in which county is it located?
hint: Average score for all subjects can be computed by AvgScrMath + AvgScrRead + AvgScrWrite
sql: SELECT T1.AvgScrMath, T2.County FROM satscores AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode WHERE NOT T1.AvgScrMath IS NULL ORDER BY T1.AvgScrMath + T1.AvgScrRead + T1.AvgScrWrite ASC NULLS FIRST LIMIT 1
blendsql:
SELECT T1.AvgScrMath, llm.County 
    FROM satscores AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode 
    JOIN llm ON T2.Street = llm.Street AND T2.School = llm.School
    WHERE T1.AvgScrMath IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T1.AvgScrMath + T1.AvgScrRead + T1.AvgScrWrite ASC LIMIT 1

query: What is the monthly average number of schools that opened in Alameda County under the jurisdiction of the Elementary School District in 1980?
hint: Elementary School District refers to DOC = 52; Monthly average number of schools that opened in 2018 = count(schools that opened in 1980) / 12
sql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(School) AS REAL) / 12 FROM schools WHERE DOC = 52 AND County = 'Alameda' AND STRFTIME(CAST(OpenDate AS TIMESTAMP), '%Y') = '1980'
blendsql:
SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT schools.School) AS REAL) / 12 
    FROM schools JOIN llm ON schools.Street = llm.Street AND schools.School = llm.School
    WHERE schools.DOC = 52 AND llm.County = 'Alameda' AND strftime('%Y', schools.OpenDate) = '1980'

query: What is the height of the tallest player? Indicate his name.
hint: tallest player refers to MAX(height);
sql: SELECT player_name FROM Player ORDER BY height DESC LIMIT 1
blendsql:
SELECT Player.player_name 
    FROM Player INNER JOIN llm_player ON Player.player_name = llm_player.player_name AND Player.weight = llm_player.weight
    ORDER BY llm_player.height 
    DESC LIMIT 1

query: Which League had the most matches end as draw in the 2016 season?
hint: most matches end as draw refers to MAX(SUM(home_team_goal = away_team_goal)); 2016 season refers to season = '2015/2016';
sql: SELECT t2.name FROM Match AS t1 INNER JOIN League AS t2 ON t1.league_id = t2.id WHERE t1.season = '2015/2016' AND t1.home_team_goal = t1.away_team_goal GROUP BY t2.name ORDER BY COUNT(t1.id) DESC LIMIT 1
blendsql:
SELECT t2.league_name 
    FROM Match AS t1 INNER JOIN Team AS awayteam ON t1.away_team_api_id = awayteam.team_api_id 
    INNER JOIN Team AS hometeam ON t1.home_team_api_id = hometeam.team_api_id 
    INNER JOIN llm_match AS t2 ON hometeam.team_long_name = t2.home_team 
        AND awayteam.team_long_name = t2.away_team AND t1.date = t2.date
    WHERE t1.season = '2015/2016' AND t2.home_team_goal = t2.away_team_goal 
    GROUP BY t2.league_name 
    ORDER BY COUNT(t1.id) DESC LIMIT 1

query: What is the average height of players born between 1990 and 1995?
hint: average height = DIVIDE(SUM(height), COUNT(id)); players born between 1990 and 1995 refers to birthday > = '1990-01-01 00:00:00' AND birthday < '1996-01-01 00:00:00';
sql: SELECT SUM(height) / COUNT(id) FROM Player WHERE SUBSTRING(birthday, 1, 4) BETWEEN '1990' AND '1995'
blendsql:
SELECT SUM(T2.height) / COUNT(id) 
    FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN llm_player AS T2 ON T1.player_name = T2.player_name AND T1.weight = T2.weight
    WHERE SUBSTR(T2.birthday, 1, 4) BETWEEN '1990' AND '1995'

query: In Scotland Premier League, which away team won the most during the 2010 season?
hint: Scotland Premier League refers to League.name = 'Scotland Premier League'; away team refers to away_team_api_id; away team that won the most refers to MAX(SUBTRACT(away_team_goal, home_team_goal) > 0); 2010 season refers to season = '2009/2010';
sql: SELECT ANY_VALUE(teamInfo.team_long_name) AS team_long_name FROM League AS leagueData INNER JOIN Match AS matchData ON leagueData.id = matchData.league_id INNER JOIN Team AS teamInfo ON matchData.away_team_api_id = teamInfo.team_api_id WHERE leagueData.name = 'Scotland Premier League' AND matchData.season = '2009/2010' AND matchData.away_team_goal - matchData.home_team_goal > 0 GROUP BY matchData.away_team_api_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1
blendsql:
SELECT away.team_long_name 
    FROM Match AS t1 INNER JOIN Team AS away ON t1.away_team_api_id = away.team_api_id 
    INNER JOIN Team AS home ON t1.home_team_api_id = home.team_api_id
    INNER JOIN llm_match AS t2 ON home.team_long_name = t2.home_team 
        AND away.team_long_name = t2.away_team AND t1.date = t2.date
    WHERE t2.league_name = 'Scotland Premier League' 
        AND t1.season = '2009/2010' 
        AND t2.away_team_goal - t2.home_team_goal > 0 
    GROUP BY t1.away_team_api_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

query: At present, calculate for the player's age who have a sprint speed of no less than 97 between 2013 to 2015.
hint: players age at present = SUBTRACT((DATETIME(), birthday)); sprint_speed > = 97; between 2013 to 2015 refers to date > = '2013-01-01 00:00:00' AND date < = '2015-12-31 00:00:00';
sql: SELECT DATEDIFF('year', CAST(T2.birthday AS DATE), CURRENT_DATE) AS age FROM Player_Attributes AS t1 INNER JOIN Player AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE SUBSTRING(t1."date", 1, 10) BETWEEN '2013-01-01' AND '2015-12-31' AND t1.sprint_speed >= 97
blendsql:
SELECT DATETIME() - t3.birthday age 
    FROM Player_Attributes AS t1 INNER JOIN Player AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id 
    JOIN llm_player as t3 ON t2.player_name = t3.player_name
    WHERE SUBSTR(t1.`date`, 1, 10) BETWEEN '2013-01-01' AND '2015-12-31' AND t1.sprint_speed >= 97

query: Give the name of the league with the highest matches of all time and how many matches were played in the said league.
hint: name of the league refers to League.name; league with highest matches of all time refers to MAX(COUNT(league_id));
sql: SELECT t2.name, COUNT(t1.id) FROM Match AS t1 INNER JOIN League AS t2 ON t1.league_id = t2.id GROUP BY t2.name ORDER BY COUNT(t1.id) DESC LIMIT 1
blendsql:
SELECT t2.league_name, COUNT(t1.id) 
    FROM Match AS t1 INNER JOIN Team AS awayteam ON t1.away_team_api_id = awayteam.team_api_id 
    INNER JOIN Team AS hometeam ON t1.home_team_api_id = hometeam.team_api_id 
    INNER JOIN llm_match AS t2 ON hometeam.team_long_name = t2.home_team 
        AND awayteam.team_long_name = t2.away_team AND t1.date = t2.date
    GROUP BY t2.league_name ORDER BY COUNT(t1.id) DESC LIMIT 1

query: List the top 5 leagues in ascending order of the number of goals made in all seasons combined.
hint: number of goals made in all seasons combine = SUM(home_team_goal, away_team_goal);
sql: SELECT t1.name, SUM(t2.home_team_goal) + SUM(t2.away_team_goal) FROM League AS t1 INNER JOIN Match AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.league_id GROUP BY t1.name ORDER BY SUM(t2.home_team_goal) + SUM(t2.away_team_goal) ASC NULLS FIRST LIMIT 5
blendsql:
SELECT t4.league_name, SUM(t4.home_team_goal) + SUM(t4.away_team_goal) 
    FROM Match AS t1 INNER JOIN Team AS t2 on t1.home_team_api_id = t2.team_api_id
    INNER JOIN Team AS t3 ON t1.away_team_api_id = t3.team_api_id
    JOIN llm_match AS t4 ON t2.team_long_name = t4.home_team AND t3.team_long_name = t4.away_team AND t1.date = t4.date
    GROUP BY t4.league_name ORDER BY SUM(t4.home_team_goal) + SUM(t4.away_team_goal) ASC LIMIT 5

query:
How many matches in the 2015/2016 season were held in Scotland Premier League
?
hint: Scotland Premier League refers to League.name = 'Scotland Premier League';
sql: SELECT COUNT(t2.id) FROM League AS t1 INNER JOIN Match AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.league_id WHERE t2.season = '2015/2016' AND t1.name = 'Scotland Premier League'
blendsql:
SELECT COUNT(t1.id) 
    FROM Match AS t1 INNER JOIN Team AS awayteam ON t1.away_team_api_id = awayteam.team_api_id 
    INNER JOIN Team AS hometeam ON t1.home_team_api_id = hometeam.team_api_id 
    INNER JOIN llm_match AS t2 ON hometeam.team_long_name = t2.home_team 
        AND awayteam.team_long_name = t2.away_team AND t1.date = t2.date
    WHERE t1.season = '2015/2016' AND t2.league_name = 'Scotland Premier League'

query: What is the preferred foot when attacking of the youngest football player?
hint: preferred foot when attacking refers to preferred_foot; youngest football player refers to latest birthday;
sql: SELECT t2.preferred_foot FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id ORDER BY t1.birthday DESC LIMIT 1
blendsql:
SELECT T2.preferred_foot 
    FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN llm_player AS T2 ON T1.player_name = T2.player_name AND T1.weight = T2.weight
    ORDER BY T2.birthday DESC LIMIT 1

query: What is the name of the football league in the country of Netherlands?
hint: name of the football league refers to League.name;
sql: SELECT t2.name FROM Country AS t1 INNER JOIN League AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.country_id WHERE t1.name = 'Netherlands'
blendsql:
SELECT t2.league_name 
    FROM Match AS t1 INNER JOIN Team AS awayteam ON t1.away_team_api_id = awayteam.team_api_id 
    INNER JOIN Team AS hometeam ON t1.home_team_api_id = hometeam.team_api_id 
    INNER JOIN llm_match AS t2 ON hometeam.team_long_name = t2.home_team 
        AND awayteam.team_long_name = t2.away_team AND t1.date = t2.date
    GROUP BY t2.league_name
    HAVING t2.country_name = 'Netherlands'

query: Please list the year and country during which the race is held on circuits in Shanghai.
hint: Shanghai is a name of location;
sql: SELECT T2.year, T1.country FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T2.circuitID = T1.circuitId WHERE T1.location = 'Shanghai'
blendsql:
SELECT T2.year, T3.country 
    FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T2.circuitID = T1.circuitId
    JOIN llm_circuits AS T3 ON T1.location = T3.location
    WHERE T1.location = 'Shanghai'

query: What is the location coordinates of the circuits for Australian grand prix?
hint: coordinates refers to (lat, lng);
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.lat, T1.lng FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T2.circuitID = T1.circuitId WHERE T2.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
blendsql:
SELECT DISTINCT T3.lat, T3.lng 
    FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T2.circuitID = T1.circuitId
    JOIN llm_circuits AS T3 ON T1.location = T3.location AND T1.name = T3.name
    WHERE T2.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'

query: Where can I find the information about the races held on Sepang International Circuit?
hint: information about races refers to url;
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.url FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T2.circuitID = T1.circuitId WHERE T1.name = 'Sepang International Circuit'
blendsql:
SELECT DISTINCT T1.url 
    FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T2.circuitID = T1.circuitId
    JOIN llm_circuits AS T3 ON T1.location = T3.location AND T1.name = T3.name
    WHERE T1.name = 'Sepang International Circuit'

query: For the drivers who took part in the race in 1983/7/16, what's their race completion rate?
hint: DIVIDE(COUNT(driverid where time has value and date = '1983-07-16'), (COUNT(driverid where date = '1983-07-16')) as percentage
sql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN NOT T2.time IS NULL THEN T2.driverId END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.driverId) FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T2.raceId = T1.raceId WHERE T1.date = '1983-07-16'
blendsql:
SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.time IS NOT NULL THEN T2.driverId END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.driverId) 
    FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T2.raceId = T1.raceId 
    INNER JOIN llm_races AS T3 ON T3.year = T1.year AND T3.name = T1.name
    WHERE T1.year = 1983 AND T3.date = '1983-07-16'

query: Where is Malaysian Grand Prix held? Give the location coordinates.
hint: coordinates refers to (lat, lng);
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.lat, T1.lng FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T2.circuitID = T1.circuitId WHERE T2.name = 'Malaysian Grand Prix'
blendsql:
SELECT DISTINCT T3.lat, T3.lng 
    FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T2.circuitID = T1.circuitId
    JOIN llm_circuits AS T3 ON T1.location = T3.location AND T1.name = T3.name
    WHERE T2.name = 'Malaysian Grand Prix'

query: Show me the season page of year when the race No. 901 took place.
hint: race number refers to raceId;
sql: SELECT T2.url FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN seasons AS T2 ON T2.year = T1.year WHERE T1.raceId = 901
blendsql:
SELECT T2.season_url 
    FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN llm_races AS T2 ON T2.year = T1.year AND T2.name = T1.name
    WHERE T1.raceId = 901

query: For the driver who set the fastest lap speed, what is his nationality?
hint:
the fastest lap speed refers to (MAX) fastestLapSpeed

SQL mentions raceId = 348, that is not in the question
sql: SELECT T1.nationality FROM drivers AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T2.driverId = T1.driverId WHERE NOT T2.fastestLapTime IS NULL ORDER BY T2.fastestLapSpeed DESC LIMIT 1
blendsql:
SELECT T3.nationality 
    FROM drivers AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T2.driverId = T1.driverId 
    INNER JOIN llm_people AS T3 ON T1.forename || T1.surname = T3.name
    WHERE T2.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL 
    ORDER BY T2.fastestLapSpeed DESC LIMIT 1

query: State the name and date of the last 5 rounds of race in year 1999.
hint: the last round refers to max(round);
sql: SELECT name, date FROM races WHERE year = 1999 ORDER BY round DESC LIMIT 5
blendsql:
SELECT T1.name, T2.date 
    FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN llm_races AS T2 ON T2.year = T1.year AND T2.name = T1.name
    WHERE T1.year = 1999 
    ORDER BY T1.round 
    DESC LIMIT 5

query: Please list all the superpowers of 3-D Man.
hint: 3-D Man refers to superhero_name = '3-D Man'; superpowers refers to power_name
sql: SELECT T3.power_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN superpower AS T3 ON T2.power_id = T3.id WHERE T1.superhero_name = '3-D Man'
blendsql:
SELECT llm_hero_2_power.power_name
    FROM superhero JOIN llm_hero_2_power ON superhero.superhero_name = llm_hero_2_power.superhero_name
    JOIN superpower ON llm_hero_2_power.power_name = superpower.power_name
    WHERE superhero.superhero_name = '3-D Man'

query: How many superheroes have the super power of "Super Strength"?
hint: super power of "Super Strength" refers to power_name = 'Super Strength'
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.hero_id) FROM hero_power AS T1 INNER JOIN superpower AS T2 ON T1.power_id = T2.id JOIN superhero AS T3 ON T3.id = T1.hero_id WHERE T2.power_name = 'Super Strength'
blendsql:
SELECT COUNT(T1.superhero_name) 
    FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN llm_hero_2_power AS T2 ON T1.superhero_name = T2.superhero_name
    WHERE T2.power_name = 'Super Strength'

query: Among the superheroes with blue eyes, how many of them have the super power of "Agility"?
hint: blue eyes refers to colour = 'Blue' and eye_colour_id = colour.id; super power of "Agility" refers to power_name = 'Agility'
sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN superpower AS T3 ON T2.power_id = T3.id INNER JOIN colour AS T4 ON T1.eye_colour_id = T4.id WHERE T3.power_name = 'Agility' AND T4.colour = 'Blue'
blendsql:
SELECT COUNT(T1.id) 
    FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN llm_hero_2_power AS T2 ON T1.superhero_name = T2.superhero_name
    JOIN llm AS T3 ON T1.superhero_name = T3.superhero_name
    WHERE T2.power_name = 'Agility' AND T3.eye_color = 'Blue'

query: Please list the superhero names of all the superheroes that have blue eyes and blond hair.
hint: blue eyes refers to colour = 'Blue' and eye_colour_id = colour.id; blond hair refers to colour = 'Blond' and hair_colour_id = colour.id; super power of "Agility" refers to power_name = 'Agility'
sql: SELECT T1.superhero_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN colour AS T2 ON T1.eye_colour_id = T2.id INNER JOIN colour AS T3 ON T1.hair_colour_id = T3.id WHERE T2.colour = 'Blue' AND T3.colour = 'Blond'
blendsql:
SELECT T1.superhero_name 
    FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN llm AS T2 ON T1.superhero_name = T2.superhero_name 
    WHERE T2.eye_color = 'Blue' AND T2.hair_color = 'Blond'

query: What is the average height of the superheroes from Marvel Comics?
hint: superheroes from Marvel Comics refers to publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'; average height of the superheroes refers to AVG(height_cm)
sql: SELECT AVG(T1.height_cm) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id WHERE T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
blendsql:
SELECT AVG(T1.height_cm) 
    FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN llm AS T2 ON T1.superhero_name = T2.superhero_name
    WHERE T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'

query: How many superheroes did DC Comics publish?
hint: superheroes that DC Comics published refers to publisher_name = 'DC Comics'
sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id WHERE T2.publisher_name = 'DC Comics'
blendsql:
SELECT COUNT(T1.id) 
    FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN llm AS T2 ON T1.superhero_name = T2.superhero_name
    WHERE T2.publisher_name = 'DC Comics'

query: What are the names of the superheroes with the power of death touch?
hint: name of superheroes refers to refers to superhero_name; the power of death touch refers to power_name = 'Death Touch'
sql: SELECT T1.superhero_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN superpower AS T3 ON T2.power_id = T3.id WHERE T3.power_name = 'Death Touch'
blendsql:
SELECT T1.superhero_name 
    FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN llm_hero_2_power AS T2 ON T1.superhero_name = T2.superhero_name
    WHERE T2.power_name = 'Death Touch'

query: Between DC and Marvel Comics, which publisher has published more superheroes? Find the difference in the number of superheroes they have published.
hint: DC refers to publisher_name = 'DC Comics'; Marvel Comics refers to publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'; calculation = SUBTRACT(SUM(publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'), SUM(publisher_name = 'DC Comics'))
sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T2.publisher_name = 'DC Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id
blendsql:
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T2.publisher_name = 'DC Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) 
    FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN llm AS T2 ON T1.superhero_name = T2.superhero_name

query: Provide the superpowers of the superhero called Deathlok.
hint: superpowers refers to power_name; Deathlok refers to superhero_name = 'Deathlok'
sql: SELECT T3.power_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN superpower AS T3 ON T2.power_id = T3.id WHERE T1.superhero_name = 'Deathlok'
blendsql:
SELECT T2.power_name 
    FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN llm_hero_2_power AS T2 ON T1.superhero_name = T2.superhero_name
    WHERE T1.superhero_name = 'Deathlok'

query: What is the average weight of all female superheroes?
hint: female refers to gender_id = 2; average weight refers to AVG(weight_kg)
sql: SELECT AVG(T1.weight_kg) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN gender AS T2 ON T1.gender_id = T2.id WHERE T2.gender = 'Female'
blendsql:
SELECT AVG(T1.weight_kg) 
    FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN llm AS T2 ON T1.superhero_name = T2.superhero_name
    WHERE T2.gender = 'Female'

query: Give the name of the alien superheroes.
hint: alien superheroes refers to race = 'Alien'; name of superhero refers to superhero_name;
sql: SELECT T1.superhero_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.race_id = T2.id WHERE T2.race = 'Alien'
blendsql:
SELECT T1.superhero_name 
    FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN llm AS T2 ON T1.superhero_name = T2.superhero_name
    WHERE T2.race = 'Alien'
